'''Oolids''' were native to [[Oolidi]] and were affiliated with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. [[Tolik Yar]] was their [[Senator/Legends|senator]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Author/Legends|Author]] [[Michael P. Kube-McDowell]] created the Oolid for his novel, ''[[Before the Storm]]'', published by [[Bantam Spectra]] in [[1996]]. Its sequel, ''[[Shield of Lies]]'', also featured the same Oolid senator. In [[2000]], [[James Luceno]] reprized the senator in ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'', published by [[Del Rey]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
